<!--
  Thank you for taking the time to open an issue.
  Please provide as much detail as possible to help us understand and reproduce the problem
  or evaluate your suggestion.
-->

## Issue type

<!-- Replace [ ] with [x] to select all that apply. -->
- [ ] Bug report
- [ ] Feature request
- [ ] Documentation issue
- [ ] Question / other

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the issue. -->


## Steps to reproduce (for bugs)

<!--
  1. Go to '...'
  2. Click on '...'
  3. Scroll down to '...'
  4. See error
-->


## Expected behavior

<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->


## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happened? Include error messages and logs if relevant. -->


## Environment

<!-- Example:
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Runtime / tools: [e.g. Node.js 20, Python 3.11, Java 21]
- Version: [application/library version]
-->


## Additional context

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or information that might be helpful. -->
